feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: soulmate au, 10k
entry.summary:
Author: Stout

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,515Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 1

Summary: Stiles is pretty sure that soulmates aren't a real thing. Sue him, he's a romantic. Which means that he doesn't believe that love is predetermined by the stars, or the fates, or any bullshit like that. There's no way a magic spell exists that can order up love like it's a large pepperoni with extra mushrooms. Stiles thinks - no, he knows - that love is decision you make. One that you keep making, every day. And even if soulmates were a real thing, he definitely wouldn't be Derek Hale's. But on the off chance Derek does have a soulmate - someone out there who could finally make him happy in the way he deserves to be happy - Stiles might as well try the stupid spell. He's going to find whoever it is even if it kills him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Cora Hale
  • Erica Reyes

entry.title: For the ones I love, I will sacrifice
entry.summary:
Author: interested

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 130,478Chapters: 37/38Kudos: 1,977

Summary: Stiles is doing the best he can. His best friend, a certain Scott McCall, is furiously in love with Allison Argent, resulting in a less than ideal best friend situation. Werewolves are still a huge (inconvenient yet strangely now normal) part of his life. But to add the metaphorical cherry to his metaphorical sundae, Derek Hale (Mr.Tall-Dark-And-Broody himself) is starting to pick up on a secret Stiles has been hiding since the time of his mother's death. A secret he has kept from the pack, his father, and even Scott. And though Derek makes him want to open his mouth and spill all there is to spill, Stiles can't bring himself to open up to the man. He can't.....can he? OR Stiles has been abused by a family member ever since his mother's death, and Derek finds out just as the beatings become the worst they have ever been. Shit hits the fan.

entry.title: Only When It's You
entry.summary:
Author: MystikCeleste

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,191Chapters: 2/39Kudos: 10

Summary: A plan that will bring together the Supernatural world of the West Coast and the Shadow World of the East Coast. Two brothers that don't know the other exists. Two groups of warriors fighting the same war on opposite sides of the country. Warriors that should know each other, but don’t. It’s time for them to meet.

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,669Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 28

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,912Chapters: 7/40Kudos: 23

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Margaritki
entry.summary:
Author: milkyway

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,588Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: After their first night together, Derek and Stiles spend a rain-washed April day in Monterey. By moonrise, Derek shares the most private part of himself: the freedom of running as a wolf beneath the full moon. In a field of flowers, wonder becomes certainty. The universe responds. Or: a little story about first love, belonging, and one revolution of the Earth.

entry.title: Shifting Fates
entry.summary:
Author: SarcasmIsMyOnlyDefence24

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,775Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 292

Summary: Given the chance to rewrite the past, Stiles wants to fix everything, but he'll have to start at square one. Some bonds are gone, some mistakes can’t be ignored, and some people have to die. Stiles holds everything on his shoulders. Only he knows what happens and only he can save his friends.

entry.summary:

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,787Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 51

Summary: Hockey stars Derek and Stiles are rivals on the ice, but little does anyone know that they’ve been friends with benefits off the ice for years. entry.title: Nothing Like Losing a Limb
entry.summary:
Author: ash_mcj

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,231Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 1,186

Summary: “I’m okay,” Derek said, but it sounded just as much like a lie as it felt. “I mean…not really, but y’know. My control is shit, and not having Stiles around doesn’t help.” “I’m sure he’s taking it hard, too,” Paige told him gently—and she had no idea how right she was. Stiles was having some serious issues, and the fiasco from that morning at the hospital was still weighing heavy on Derek’s mind. “I always heard losing a member of your pack is like losing a limb, but it’s not. It’s…more like I’m the limb, and I’ve lost the body.” - Once the smoke dissipated after the tragedy at Hale Manor, the surviving members of the pack were scattered like ash in the wind. They might have escaped the flames that night—but none of them came out unscathed. [or: derek self-destructs, allison finds strength in the other side of her bloodline, cora and malia learn to survive in treacherous conditions, jackson attempts to function without his other half, and the stilinskis develop a habit of picking up strays—but who could really blame them?]
